sqlMap.select: select * from IndicationModifiers where ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into IndicationModifiers(TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey Percentage Comment LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #ModifierKey:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #Percentage# #Comment# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select Percentage, Comment, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey from IndicationModifiers where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update IndicationModifiers set
Percentage = #Percentage# Percentage = null Comment = #Comment# Comment = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from IndicationModifiers where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from IndicationModifiers where ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select Percentage, Comment, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey from IndicationModifiers where TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey, Percentage, Comment, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from IndicationModifiers where ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
